titleStmt.title: SII 11.103: original edition by C. R. Krishnamacharlu, R. S. Panchamukhi, N. Lakshminaraya Rao and H. K. Narasimhaswami
No. 103. (B.K. No. 171 of 1926-27). NANDAVĀḌIGE, HUNGUND TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT. ON A PILLAR SET UP IN FRONT OF THE ŚIVA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This much damaged inscription refers itself to the reign of Traiḷōkyamalladēva and after eulogising his queen Maiḷaladēvī, introduces a Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara (whose name is lost). It then states that a chief entitled Bhāvanagandhavārṇa constructed several temples, maṭhas, tanks, etc., at Kalyāṇa, the capital of the Chāḷukyachakravartin, the rājadhānī Aṇṇigeṟe, Muḷugunda, [Koḷvu]ge, Nandāpura, Kōhaḷḷi, Maṇḍaligeṟe, Beḷgali, rājadhānī Banavāsepura, Kariviḍi, Navile, Nandavāḍige and Pērūru and renovated the Tribhuvanatilaka-jinālaya, Mahāśrīmanta-basadi etc., at Ponnugunda, Vīra-jinālaya at Puṟagūr and a jinālaya at Kundarage. The inscription registers a gift of land made, apparently by this chief, to the pipers, songsters etc., on the occasion of the Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkāranti in the month of Pushya. Among the gifts is mentioned one for the pañcha-mahāśabda. The details of the date are lost. It is not known who this “Bhāvanagandhavāraṇa” was. The Mahāśrīmanta-basadi mentioned above was probably named after Mahāśrīmanta who was the governor of Beḷvola Three Hundred under the Rāshṭrakūṭa king Akālavarsha Kṛishṇa II (see Nos. 25 and 28 above). The villages where the temples were erected are scattered over a wide territory of the Chāḷukya empire. The name of the (temple) at Aṇṇigeṟe, called Chōḷaṁgonda-Traipurushadēva is worthy of note.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti śrī vanitāsyaratnamukaraṁ digudantidantāvaḷī
nyastōttuṅgavisuddhakīrttiniḷayaṁ cāḷu
kyarājānvayaṁ prastutyōdayasupracaṇḍakiraṇaṁ
traiḷōkyamallaṁ namaddhvastārātitirīṭatāḍitapadaṁ visvā
vanīvallabhaṁ . maḷayādhīśamahīdharēṁdraku
ḷiśaṁ māḷavyacētōmuda skhaḷanaṁ pallavapallavēṁdra
dahanaṁ pāṁḍyāvanī sēṁdu māgadha vikṣōbhitarāhu gū
jgharacaradvēdaṁḍakuṁbhastaḷīdaḷanaprauḍha mrigādhirājanabha
yaṁ cāḷukyacakrēśvaraṁ .
© svasti samastabhuvanāsrayaṁ śrī prithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja
paramēśvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśraya ḷakaṁ cāḷu
kyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatraiḷōkyamalladēvara vijayarājya
muttarōttarābhivriddhi pravarddhamāna mācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ sa
luttamire . © tatupriyāṅgane [.] svastyanavarataparamaka
lyāṇābhyudaya sahasraphaḷabhōgabhāgini dvitīyalakṣmīvi
ḷāsa vidyādhari dānacintāmaṇi savati madabhaṁjini samastā
ntaḻvuramukhamaṁḍani śrīmattraiḷōkyamalladēva viśāḷavakṣa
sthaḷa nivāsiniyarappa śrīmatpiriyarasi maiḷalamahādēvi
yarumaṁ . © svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāsabdamahāmaṁḍa
ḷēsvara vatsarājaṁ vanitāmanōjaṁ śau
dānārkkajātaṁ
malla nāḷeSome more

padahatiyiṁ nelaṁ nnaḍuge karṇacaḷācaḷadiṁda
mabdhigadgadege karābhighātadavigurvvaṇeyiṁ
bhagaṇaṁ dharātaḷakkudire niśātadantaghanagha
ṭṭaṇegaḷki diśāgajavrajaṁ bedaṟe virōdhi
yaṁ tuḷidu kolvudu bhāvanagandhavāraṇaṁ .
paranarapāḷasainyanavaraktasarōvaramaṁ kalaṁ
ki bhīkarasubhaṭāṁtra jāḷamridupaṁkajanāḷamanuṟci
mastakāṁburuhamanoṁduguṁdade kamuḻci jita
sramadiṁ taguḷdu saṁgarajaḷakēḷiyaṁ meṟe
yutirppudhu bhāvanagaṁdhavāraṇaṁ . vacana .
śrīmaccāḷukyacakriya rājadhāni ka
lyāṇadoḷ tuṁbēśvaramuṁ maṭamuṁ
dīpamāleyuṁ keṟeyumaṁ rājadhāni yaṇni
geṟeyoḷ cōḷaṁgoṁda śrīmattraipuruṣa
dēvara sāleyuṁ bhōgādityanikētanamuṁ pe
rmmāḍiya basadiya purada kēriyuṁ pe
rggeṟeyumaṁ . muḷguṁdada śrīpāḷēśvara
da maṭamumaṁ . koḷvugeya sivālayamu
lōkapāḷasamētaṁ jalaśayanadēvara tī
rtthamumaṁ nandāpuradoḷ kētēśvaramumaṁ kōhaḷḷi
yoḷ dānavinōdatraipuruṣadēvara sāleyu
maṇḍaligeṟeyoḷ saṁbunārāyaṇanikē
tanamumaṁ beḷgalliya kapilatīrtthadoḷ kētēśva
ramuṁ . rājadhāni banavāsepurada jayaṁtīmadhu
kēśvarada mogasāleyumaṁ kariviḍiyoḷ kētēśva
ramumaṁ navileya jaṭeya saṁkara dēvālayamu
maṁ nandavāḍigeyoḷ śrīnāgalēśvaramu(ṁ)nalliya
maṭamumaṁ pērūroḷ kētēśvaramumaṁ matta
vu modalāge palavu dēvāyatanaṁgaḷaṁ siṁ
rmma nirmmiteṁgaḷuṁ vaḷitōttuṁgataḷa
teraṁgaḷumāge māḍisi ponaguṁdada tribhuva
natiḷaka jinālayamuṁ mahāśrīmanta
basadiyumaṁ puṟagūra vīrajinālayamu
maṁ kuṁdurageya jinamaṁdiramumaṁ posa
tāge posatāge paḍisalisi saṁgavada saṁgavē
śvara ya poḷege nūṟu matta
damaged
svasti saka
tsarada puṣya
tta rāyaṇa saṁkrāThe

pā vigaṁ mārōjaṁge mattar 50 paṁcamahāśa
bdakke dhōrōjaṁge mattar 40 vaṁsigaṁge mattar 10
pāḍuvarirbarggaṁ mattar 30 pātraveraḍarkkaṁ ma
ttar 48 bhōgada sūḷeyar 4 mānasa
rggaṁ mattar 76 mālagāṟaṁge ma
ttar 13 daṇḍēsvaraṁ yippaṁge matta
r 12 Intī dharmmama nāvanūrvvana
ḷida nappaḍātaṁge kurukṣētradoḷaṁ bā
ṇarāsiyoḷaṁ mūṟukōṭi kavilega
ḷuma nanibaru brāhmaṇaruma naḷidani
supāpaṁ sārgguṁ . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō
harēti vasuṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasahasrā
ṇi miṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . ©
sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasētuṁ nripā
ṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanīyō bhava
dbhiḥ sarvvānētāṁ bhāginaḥ pārtthivē
ndrō bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāma
bhadraḥ © Akarasya karaprāpti gōsa
hasra vadhaṁ yathā . karapravritti vi
cchēdādgōkōṭiphalamaśnutē . bahubhi
rvvasudhā dattā rājabhiḥ sagarādibhiḥ
yasya yasya yadā bhūmiḥ tasya
tasya tadā paḷaṁ ©
